title: SPCX IPO: Jim Chanos Says SpaceX's $1.75 Trillion Valuation Is Built On 'Hopes And Dreams' — Oppenheimer Sees $10 Trillion Opportunity
sentences: SPCX IPO: Jim Chanos Says SpaceX's $1.75 Trillion Valuation Is Built On 'Hopes And Dreams' — Oppenheimer Sees $10 Trillion Opportunity According to a Reuters report, Chanos said that he believes SpaceX is not worth $1.75 trillion based on reasonable assumptions over the next five years.
